extDescription.message: Chinese↔English only. Auto page translation plus caption or voice simultaneous interpretation.

popupSub.message: Chinese↔English only · selection bubble · video SI

masterSwitchHint.message: When on, selecting text shows the bubble (ZH↔EN)

siModesDesc.message: Chinese↔English only. Pick a style, then start video SI on this page.

modeCaptionHint.message: Overlay bilingual captions during SI (draggable / history)

modeVoiceHint.message: Read the translation aloud during SI (captions still shown)

consoleRestricted.message: Cannot show the floating panel on system pages. Open a normal website (e.g. google.com) and click the icon again.

consoleInjectFailed.message: Could not inject the floating panel. Refresh the page and try again.

directionPrefsHint.message: Choose EN→ZH, ZH→EN, or both (selection bubble + SI).

toastDirectionDisabled.message: This direction is turned off in settings

refreshPageHint.message: Open a normal webpage and refresh

errEnableMasterFirst.message: Turn on the master switch first

errInjectFailed.message: Cannot connect to this page. Refresh the video page, then start SI.

errSiStartFailed.message: Failed to start SI: confirm this page has a video and was refreshed

siStartedPlay.message: SI on — click play on the video

siStartedNoVideo.message: SI on — no video yet; audio capture starts when one plays

optionsTagline.message: Scope: Chinese↔English only · works without a key · optional API key

sectionProviderDesc.message: Pick a vendor preset or a custom OpenAI-compatible gateway.

sectionCredsDesc.message: Key is optional. Without it, free translation works; with a key you get full AI / video SI.

sectionSecurityDesc.message: Off by default. When on, API Key / iFlytek APISecret are AES-GCM encrypted on this device. The passphrase is not stored; unlock once per browser session after restart. Nothing is uploaded.

hardeningEnable.message: Enable encrypted storage (unlock required after restart)

passphraseDesc.message: Enter one or auto-generate. Used only to encrypt/unlock this session; not written to storage. Keep a backup copy.

unlockDesc.message: When encrypted credentials exist, enter the passphrase to unlock the current browser session (again after restart).

clearVault.message: Clear encrypted keys and disable hardening

sectionModelsDesc.message: One field each: pick from suggestions or type a custom model name.

bubblePageTranslateHint.message: Translate the current viewport (from the bubble menu)

bubbleSiHint.message: Start / stop simultaneous interpretation for this tab

bubbleSiVideoHint.message: Capture video audio · play the video first · this page only

bubbleSiMicHint.message: Mic dictation · this page only · reopen after navigation
